examples:
Command Example
cofense-get-attachment attachment_id=8195
Context Example
{
name: cofense-get-attachment

outputs.description: The ID number of the report that contains the attachment. File.Size The date and time (in UTC) when the threat was found on the device.
outputs.name: Attachment.ID

outputs.description: The file path where the threat was found on the device. File.Name The name of the threat.
outputs.name: File.EntryID

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the threat. File.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the threat.
outputs.name: File.SHA1

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the threat.
outputs.name: File.MD5
